extract: Levincia (Japanese: ハッコウシティ Hakkō City) is a city in the Paldea region, located in East Province (Area Two). Historically, it used to be a port town that shipped ore from the mines, before it became a major business hub in the present day. Because of the Gym's specialized type, the people of this city tend to walk around accompanied by Electric-type Pokémon.
